zh.lifeSummary: 當Grace Bannester於1490年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾普雷斯頓時，她的父親Lawarence Banester23歲，母親Elizabeth Lister21歲。她於1518年與William G Wall在英國藍卡爾普雷斯頓結婚。他們至少是7個兒子的父母。她去世於1577年11月19日在英國享年87歲，埋葬在英國倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Grace Bannester于1490年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾普雷斯頓时，她的父亲Lawarence Banester23岁，母亲Elizabeth Lister21岁。她于1518年与William G Wall在英国藍卡爾普雷斯頓结婚。他们至少是7个儿子的父母。她去世于1577年11月19日在英国享年87岁，埋葬在英国倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Bannester
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Bannister
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from Old French banaste, banastre ‘covering for a cart or wagon; basket’, i.e. a large wicker container. In the 12th century a Norman family of this name had estates in Orne, Normandy, and in England. Ricardus Banastre appears in charters relating to the Earls of Chester c. 1120–29. With what sense the Norman surname was acquired is unknown. It can hardly have been occupational, contrary to Reaney's view that it denoted a basket maker. It is possible that many or even all of the later bearers of the surname were descended from this knightly family. However, several men with this surname in the 14th-century Poll Tax Returns are described as servants or agricultural laborers, while Ricardus Banastr', recorded in 1381 was a butcher. It is conceivable that these men took their name from Middle English banastre, a borrowing of the French word, and that it referred to a basket or hamper they used in their work. Alternatively, they may have belonged to branches of the knightly family that had fallen in the social scale. The term denoting a stair rail is unconnected with this name; it was not used before the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Grace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the abstract noun (via Old French, from Latin gratia), this name occurs occasionally in the 15th century, and by the 1540s was among the most popular girls' names in some parishes. It has always been particularly popular in Scotland and northern England (borne, for example, by Grace Darling , the lighthouse keeper's daughter whose heroism in 1838 , saving sailors in a storm, caught the popular imagination). In more recent times it was famous as the name of the actress Grace Kelly ( 1928–82 ), who became Princess Grace of Monaco. In Ireland it is used as an Anglicized form of Gráinne .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Grace Bannester was born in 1490, in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Lawarence Banester, was 23 and her mother, Elizabeth Lister, was 21. She married William G Wall in 1518, in Preston, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons. She died on 19 November 1577, in England, at the age of 87, and was buried in London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Grace Bannester est née en 1490, à Preston, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lawarence Banester, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Lister, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé William G Wall en 1518, à Preston, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils. Elle est décédée le 19 novembre 1577, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 87 ans, et a été enterrée à Londres, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Grace Bannester 1490 in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lawarence Banester 23 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Lister 21. Sie hat 1518 in Preston, Lancashire, England William G Wall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne. Sie starb am 19. November 1577 im Alter von 87 Jahren in England und wurde in London, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Grace Bannester è nata il nel 1490 nel Preston, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Lawarence Banester, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Lister, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato William G Wall nel 1518, nel Preston, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli. Morì il 19 novembre 1577, nel England, all'età di 87 anni, e fu sepolta a London, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Grace Bannesterが1490年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアプレストンで生まれた時，父Lawarence Banesterは23歳，母Elizabeth Listerは21歳であった。1518年にイギリスランカシュアイアプレストンでWilliam G Wallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子の親であった。彼女は1577年11月19日にイギリスで87歳で死去し，イギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Grace Bannester(이)가 1490년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 프레스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lawarence Banester(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Lister(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1518년 영국 랭카실르 프레스턴에서 William G Wall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1577년 11월 19일 영국에서 87세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Grace Bannester nasceu em 1490, em Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Lawarence Banester, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Lister, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com William G Wall em 1518, em Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos. Ela faleceu em 19 de novembro de 1577, em Inglaterra, com 87 anos, e foi sepultada em London, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Grace Bannester родилась в 1490 г. в местности престон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Lawarence Banester было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Lister, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William G Wall в 1518 г. в местности престон, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей. Она умерла 19 ноября 1577 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 87 лет и была похоронена в местности Лондон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Grace Bannester nació en 1490, en Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Lawarence Banester, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Lister, tenía 21 años. Se casó con William G Wall en 1518, en Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos. Murió el 19 de noviembre de 1577, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 87 años, y fue sepultada en London, Inglaterra.
